personality_one_liner: Une interface claire, minimaliste et respirante où la donnée de santé est reine, rehaussée d'une touche de vert menthe dynamique pour l'action.

spacing.rule: Generous iOS-native rhythms. Cards should never be flush to the screen edge. Use md (12) to lg (16) inner padding for cards. Avoid dense dashboard grids; prefer clean single-column scrolling.

do's: Use glass on bottom tab bar
Use glass for sticky screen headers over scrolling content
Use glass for bottom sheet drag handles/headers
dont's: Do not use glass for list items or standard cards
Do not blur form fields or body text regions

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Écran de connexion et d'inscription minimaliste pour Bodypilot.
screens.layout: Hero image at the top with a gradient scrim to white, followed by clean single-column form inputs and a full-width sticky CTA button 'Se connecter' or 'S\'inscrire' at the bottom.

screens.name: HomeDashboard
screens.purpose: Résumé de la journée : calories restantes, prochain entraînement et progrès de la semaine.
screens.layout: Vertical scroll. Top section: Today's Date & Greeting. Middle: A circular progress or clean metric row for 'Calories Restantes'. Next: A 'Prochain Entraînement' card (with hero gym image background + scrim). Bottom: Quick stats.

screens.name: Workouts (List & AI Generator)
screens.purpose: Afficher l'historique et permettre de générer ou modifier un programme d'entraînement via l'IA.

states.empty: 'Aucun entraînement. Laissez l\'IA vous guider.' + Bouton primaire CTA.
states.error: Failed to generate workout, retry button.

screens.layout: List of workout cards. A sticky FAB or primary bottom CTA 'Demander à l\'IA'. AI Generator should be a form/chat UI over the abstract green background leading to an editable list of exercises. Exercises can be swiped to delete, or tapped to swap.

screens.name: Nutrition
screens.purpose: Suivi des calories avec option de suggestion de repas via l'IA.

states.empty: No meals logged. 'Loggez votre premier repas.'

screens.layout: Header shows Calorie Goal vs Eaten. Below: A list of logged meals (Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner). Floating 'Idées Repas IA' button that generates a meal plan card (with the salad image) fitting the remaining calories.

screens.name: Progress
screens.purpose: Suivi du poids et des mensurations.
screens.layout: Line chart at the top. List of recent measurement logs below it. Top right '+' icon to add a new measurement.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Gestion du compte, objectifs, et déconnexion.
screens.layout: Initials Avatar in a brandTertiary circle. List of settings rows with Phosphor icons wrapped in tinted brandTertiary squares.

instructions_to_main_agent: ALL text must be in French as explicitly requested in the problem statement.
Strictly follow the 500 max font-weight rule. Do NOT use SemiBold, Bold, or weight 600+. Use size and color to establish hierarchy (e.g., textFontFamily with size xl for headers).
No blue or purple colors whatsoever. The app relies strictly on the mint green palette ('vert menthe') and minimalist white/greys.
Implement a gradient scrim (top to bottom, transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse) any time text is placed over the hero images (hero_gym, ai_meals, ai_generator_bg).
For the Workout Editor, use large tap targets (min 56pt height) and implement swipe-to-delete using gesture-handler for exercises.
For settings and list items, wrap leading icons in a `brandTertiary` tinted rounded square instead of leaving them bare.
Ensure the sticky primary CTA pattern is used at the bottom of forms (Auth, Log Meal, Workout generation) with safe area padding to prevent overlap with the home indicator.
Incorporate haptics for interactive elements based on the haptics mapping provided.
